commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# docker-compose.yml
# Mirrors a production-like topology: Postgres + Redis + three Django instances
# behind Nginx + Celery worker/beat + Locust.
#
# Non-functional requirements anchored here:
#   [NFR2] Gunicorn worker/thread counts come from env vars.
#   [NFR3] celery_worker / celery_beat run async tasks off the request path.
#   [NFR4] celery_beat triggers the daily batch job.
#   [NFR5] web1 + web2 + web3 behind nginx simulate horizontal load distribution.
#   [NFR6] redis is shared across instances -> truly distributed cache.
#   [NFR9] locust container drives 100+ concurrent virtual users.
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
  - "5433:5432"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER}"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 10

  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    command: ["redis-server", "--appendonly", "yes"]
    volumes:
      - redisdata:/data
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 10

  # ---- Three Django instances behind Nginx (NFR5 — web3 added by Dev 5) ----
  web1: &web
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile
    env_file: .env
    environment:
      INSTANCE_ID: web1
    depends_on:
      db: { condition: service_healthy }
      redis: { condition: service_healthy }
    expose:
      - "8000"
    ports:
      - "8001:8000"
    command: ["/app/docker/entrypoint.sh", "gunicorn"]

  web2:
    <<: *web
    environment:
      INSTANCE_ID: web2
    ports:
      - "8002:8000"

  # NFR5: third instance added by Developer 5 for 3-backend least_conn demo
  web3:
    <<: *web
    environment:
      INSTANCE_ID: web3
    ports:
      - "8003:8000"

  nginx:
    image: nginx:1.27-alpine
    depends_on: [web1, web2, web3]
    volumes:
      - ./docker/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
    ports:
      - "80:80"

  # ---- Celery (NFR3, NFR4) ----
  celery_worker:
    <<: *web
    ports: []
    expose: []
    command: ["/app/docker/entrypoint.sh", "celery-worker"]

  celery_beat:
    <<: *web
    ports: []
    expose: []
    command: ["/app/docker/entrypoint.sh", "celery-beat"]

  flower:
    <<: *web
    ports:
      - "5555:5555"
    expose: []
    command: ["/app/docker/entrypoint.sh", "flower"]

  # ---- Locust load generator (NFR9) ----
  locust:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile
    env_file: .env
    depends_on: [nginx]
    volumes:
      - ./tests/stress:/app/tests/stress
    command: ["locust", "-f", "/app/tests/stress/locustfile.py", "--host", "http://nginx"]
    ports:
      - "8089:8089"

volumes:
  pgdata:
  redisdata:
